use_cases: Creating immersive scroll-driven portfolio or gallery sections
Building visually engaging landing page hero experiences
Designing storytelling websites with parallax image reveals
Showcasing photography or visual work with smooth navigation
Adding interactive scroll-based animations to websites
ai_summary: A scroll-based parallax motion gallery component using Framer Motion that creates an immersive full-screen scrolling experience. Features scroll-snap navigation, smooth parallax image movement, floating text labels, and an animated progress indicator. Perfect for creating captivating portfolio sections, visual storytelling experiences, or modern hero introductions with sophisticated motion design.
